news.summary: Peruvians are preparing to vote this weekend for their next president, with 35 candidates competing for the top job. news.headline: General elections in Gilgit-Baltistan to be held on June 7
news.summary:
<p>GILGIT: General elections in Gilgit Baltistan will be held on June 7, the GB Election Commission announced on Saturday after a four-month delay.</p>

news.headline: Russia and Ukraine begin 32-hour ceasefire for Orthodox Easter
news.summary:
A temporary truce between Russia and Ukraine entered into force on Saturday, with Kyiv warning it would respond “immediately” if Russia violated it.

news.headline: Israeli spy firm Black Cube involved in Cyprus corruption probe
news.summary:

news.headline: US authorities launch new effort to uncover birth tourism schemes
news.summary: <p>US President Donald Trump’s administration plans to crack down on networks it says help pregnant women lie on visa applications in order to secure US citizenship for their US-born babies, an issue that Trump has highlighted to justify his attempts to restrict birthright citizenship.</p&g
